data.body: LANDED. Both child changes merged to main via Gerrit: 683 (terraform adoption + live import/apply/retag, incl. the token-confusion security fix) and 684 (ADR 0048 + SSO runbook + gerrit-aws-setup). Both stories closed + signed (plan-review + completion-verifier attestations). Live state: 18 snap resources adopted into rebar-tfstate, retagged Project=rebar, released from snap's shared state; terraform plan = 'No changes'; SSO healthy (302 to Google); no secrets clobbered. Verifying post-merge terraform-drift CI next.
